rejection_reason: Not rejected but reweighted. The 25% falsification probability is reasonable as a rough estimate but per LZ-EPH-003, the transition outcome prediction rests on 3+ unproven assumptions (SCADA will trip soon, gravity will be too slow, demand persists, surge valve fails). The probability itself is a prediction, not a measurement (LZ-RC-005). Layer 4 accepts the directional assessment (falsification is possible) but notes the specific percentage carries false precision for an event with this many unknowns.
